name: Chef's Special Recipe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｒｅｃｅｔｔｅ ｄｅ Ｓｐéｃｉａｌｉｔé</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ルセット・ド・スペシャリテ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>～<ruby lang="jp"><rb>料理長</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シェフ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>自</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>慢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のレシピ～
name_jp_rom: Rusetto Do Supesharite ~ Shefu Jiman no Reshipi ~
name_jp_tl: Recette de Spécialité ~ Chef's Special Recipe ~
desc: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated while you control a "Nouvelles" Ritual Monster: Negate the activation, then you can destroy that card if you control a monster that was Special Summoned by the effect of a "Nouvelles" monster. If you Special Summon "Hungry Burger": You can banish this card from your GY; Tribute as many monsters your opponent controls as possible. You can only use each effect of "Chef's Special Recipe" once per turn.
eff: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated while you control a "Nouvelles" Ritual Monster: Negate the activation, then you can destroy that card if you control a monster that was Special Summoned by the effect of a "Nouvelles" monster. If you Special Summon "Hungry Burger": You can banish this card from your GY; Tribute as many monsters your opponent controls as possible. You can only use each effect of "Chef's Special Recipe" once per turn.

mst: Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
